statement: In every magma, Equation 3206 (`x = (((y * z) * y) * w) * y`) implies Equation 3055 (`x = (((x * x) * y) * x) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0731
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) y) w) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op x x) y) x) x)
